function.message: Completed. I worked the oldest inbox message (`00_inbox/000_next-task.md`) and OCR-structured all bills related to Ida Novak by adding bill-schema YAML frontmatter to the three matching purchase records, while preserving each original note body verbatim. Then I deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree/read/context), read nested AGENTS files for entered folders, read 99_system workflows and finance schema before OCR/migration edits, preserved original bodies under frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical evidence came from the inbox request in `00_inbox/000_next-task.md` and three Ida-related bill records found under `50_finance/purchases/`. Schema requirements were taken from `99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md`; migration/processing behavior from workflow docs. No security-triggering content was present.
